---
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: michigan.scss
css: styles.css
lightbox: true
---


This new Winter 2026 class –– in collaboration with the University of Michigan Museum of Art –– explores political science and sociology research on how protests and social movements affect policy, focusing on 20th and 21st-century movements in the United States. We will examine the role of social movements in democracy, with a particular focus on the role of art in policy debates and social change. Applying theories of policy change to a cause of their choosing, students will create and curate movement art, culminating in an exhibition at the end of the semester.

This class will be a collaboration with UMMA staff and their [American Sampler](https://umma.umich.edu/exhibitions/american-sampler-activating-the-archive/) exhibit, and our class will meet at the museum during class time on several occasions throughout the semester.


::: {layout="[[1,1,1]]"}

![Vernon Lewis Gallery](https://imgc.artprintimages.com/img/print/vernon-lewis-gallery-u-s-history-print-of-the-statue-of-liberty-holding-up-a-burning-draft-card-instead-of-her-torch_u-l-q1r5lx60.jpg "Print of the statue of liberty holding up a burning draft card - Vernon Lewis Gallery")
 
![FIEST (2020)](https://i.pinimg.com/originals/39/c3/cf/39c3cf5aee32886531e47808dfb4b44f.jpg "Black Lives Matter by FIEST (2020)")
 
![To Change Everything We Need Everyone poster by Shepard Fairey](https://sothebys-md.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/c727504/2147483647/strip/true/crop/1499x2000+0+0/resize/1024x1366!/quality/90/?url=http:%2F%2Fsothebys-brightspot.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fmedia-desk%2F57%2Fd8%2Fe26159f449af81d8fe2639095e2f%2F043n10541-blxsn-01.jpg "2014 People's Climate March - To Change Everything We Need Everyone poster by Shepard Fairey")

![Tea Party Rally - Getty](https://media.gettyimages.com/id/525595256/photo/members-and-supporters-of-the-tea-party-hold-a-rally-calling-for-the-repeal-of-president.jpg?s=612x612&w=0&k=20&c=VdAqWSU7ZdTmoYiRVJPbwXz9nyFl1eyRX9iXQZ4ToZk= "Tea Party Rally - Getty")

![Gucci CHIME Zine curated by Kimberlé Crenshaw](https://vmagazine.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/BANNER-sayhername.jpg)

![](https://static.independent.co.uk/2024/03/08/05/SEI195031379.jpg "Marjorie Taylor-Greene's 'say her name' shirt at State of the Union")

!["It Can't Happen Here" - Shepard Fairey](https://i0.wp.com/obeygiant.com/images/2026/01/It-Cant-Happen-18X24.jpg "It Can't Happen Here - Shepard Fairey" )

!["Migration is Beautiful" by Favianna Rodriguez](https://i0.wp.com/justseeds.org/wp-content/uploads/MigrationIsBeautiful2018_8in_1500-3.jpg "Migration is Beautiful by Favianna Rodriguez" )

 ![One Nation Under God - WalMart.com](https://i5.walmartimages.com/seo/One-Nation-Under-God-Fourth-of-July-Shirt-Christian-American-Shirt-God-Bless-America-Pledge-Of-Allegiance-Independence-Day-Tee-Patriotic-Tee_0818676f-8c85-4dbe-b394-80acbdb527ba.c87ba2bc391dbfb98e2ecd4e4208fdc5.jpeg "One Nation Under God - WalMart.com")



![Education makes American Great (2017) by David Hays](https://www.yesmagazine.org/wp-content/uploads/imports/ad95049b3b3a41cab7fb49c82eefd803.jpg "Education makes American Great (2017) by David Hays - CAN collection")

![Miss America’s Favorite Son - Shepard Fairey ](https://i0.wp.com/obeygiant.com/images/2026/02/Miss-Americas-FAVORITE-SON-18x24-1.jpg "A person holding a gun")

![Abandon Punishment - Roger Peet](https://justseeds.org/wp-content/uploads/abandonpunishment_1500.jpg "Abandon Punishment poster by Roger Peet")

![Farms not Factories - Shepard Fairey](https://i0.wp.com/obeygiant.com/images/2025/09/Farm-Aid-2025-18x24-1.jpg?fit=600%2C800&ssl=1 "A print of a farm")

![](https://i0.wp.com/justseeds.org/wp-content/uploads/28-Sanya-Hyland-Taking-Back-Resources1-1500.jpg?ssl=1 "A poster about taking money from the rich for social goods")

![](https://culturalpolitics.net/index/sites/default/files/inline-images/labor%20union%20women.jpg "Labor poster")

![](https://culturalpolitics.net/index/sites/default/files/inline-images/labor%20movement.jpg "Labor poster")

![Rosie the Riveter (1943) by Norman Rockwell](https://www.artchive.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Rosie-the-Riveter-Rockwell-Norman-1943-2.jpg "Rosie the Riveter (1943) by Norman Rockwell")

![We can do it! - CAN collection](https://creativeaction.network/cdn/shop/articles/We-Can-Do-It-Grid_c4042fd5-143e-4a9f-86ec-3ff8f9e728f3_2048x.jpg "We can do it! poster - CAN collection")

![Focus on the Family Pro-Life Signs](https://www.focusonthefamily.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/Screen-Shot-2023-03-24-at-9.35.10-AM.png "Focus on the Family Pro-Life Signs")

![Students for Life of America, University of North Texas Chapter](https://studentsforlife.org/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/Screen-Shot-2023-10-23-at-1.53.26-PM-min.jpg "Chalk Art of a pregnant woman saying Love them Both")

![Never Again by BubbSnugg](https://image.spreadshirtmedia.com/image-server/v1/products/T1459A839PA3861PT28X8Y0D1025685656W8333H10000/views/1,width=1200,height=630,appearanceId=839,backgroundColor=F2F2F2/never-again-coat-hanger-pro-choice-is-pro-life-sticker.jpg)

![SNCC Poster: Come Let Us Build A New World Together by Danny Lyon](https://umma.umich.edu/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Websize_SNCC_Danny-Lyon_come-let-us-build-a-new-world-together-617x485.jpg "SNCC Poster: Come Let Us Build A New World Together by Danny Lyon")

![Counterfit News by Kelli Anderson](https://farm4.static.flickr.com/3065/3025164416_5024b75e8c.jpg "A newspaper with the headline IRAQ WAR ENDS")

 ![Tea Party Protest - Wikipedia](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/6/62/Tea_Party_Protest_in_Dallas%2C_Texas_-_April%2C_2009.jpg "Tea Party Protest - Wikipedia")
 
<!--

![Justice for janitors in San Francisco, Kristin Prentice for SEIU Local 87, 1995; Inkworks Press Archive](https://www.docspopuli.org/images/06_0726_079.jpg "Justice for janitors in San Francisco, Kristin Prentice for SEIU Local 87, 1995; Inkworks Press Archive.")



![We do mind dying, Doug Minkler, 1980; Cushing Archive.](https://www.docspopuli.org/images/07_0209_059.jpg "WE do mind dying, Doug Minkler, 1980; Cushing Archive.")

--> 

:::

::: {layout="[[1,1,1, 1]]"}

![Freedom of Speech by Norman Rockwell](https://rockwellfourfreedoms.org/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/FreedomofSpeech-sm-2.jpg)

![Fredom of Worship by Norman Rockwell](https://rockwellfourfreedoms.org/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/FreedomofWorship-sm-2.jpg)

![Freedom from Want by Norman Rockwell](https://rockwellfourfreedoms.org/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/FreedomfromWant-sm-2.jpg)


![Freedom from Fear by Norman Rockwell](https://rockwellfourfreedoms.org/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/FreedomfromFear-sm-2.jpg)

<!--



![Protect yourself from this menace; IWW, circa 1921; Reuther Archive.](https://www.docspopuli.org/images/07_0510_041.jpg)

![I am somebody - together we are strong, United Farm Workers of America, circa 1977; Reuther Archive.](https://www.docspopuli.org/images/07_0510_035.jpg)


![There is no prejudice in kids unless adults put it there, UAW Fair Practices Department, circa 1963; Reuther Archive.](https://www.docspopuli.org/images/07_0510_008.jpg)

--> 


:::

![A detail from Diego Rivera’s Detroit Industry at the DIA. Photo: Getty Images](https://stories.vassar.edu/2016/assets/images/161116-hipsters-wall.jpg)

![Coalition of Immokalee Workers mística theater at the March for Rights, Respect and Fair Food](https://monacaron.com/sites/default/files/styles/full_width_1006/public/CIW_MisticaTheater_0013_MonaCaron.jpg)

![“wartime recruitment” - ICE’s New-Age Propaganda - The New Yorker](https://media.newyorker.com/photos/695d8f9a72aafd18e512ec43/2:2/w_2240,c_limit/NewYorker_ICEads_Final_animation_v2.gif)
